name: Schlera Sestius
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial female. Wears a quilted doublet and light brown linens with doeskin shoes beneath her armor. Almost always equipped with leveled light armor cuirass and boots, and frequently wears light armor gauntlets, greaves, and helmet - all of the best quality. Armed with two bows and high-quality arrows.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: restless, vigilant, dedicated, tireless, professional
Role: Schlera Sestius is a hunter living in Pell's Gate, a small settlement on the Green Road between the Imperial City and Bravil.
Home Location Information: Pell's Gate, where she maintains a constant presence in the settlement.
Daily Routine: Schlera spends all day wandering around Pell's Gate, never pausing to eat or sleep. She maintains a tireless vigil throughout the settlement at all hours.
Personality - The Tireless Sentinel: Schlera is perpetually on watch in Pell's Gate, maintaining her readiness at all times. She never rests, never eats, and never sleeps - constantly patrolling the settlement in her armor with her weapons at hand. Her dedication to vigilance is absolute, whether driven by duty, paranoia, or simply the habits of a life spent hunting dangerous prey. She is always prepared for whatever threats might emerge along the Green Road.
author: Bethesda
